title: periscope-agent Helm values
description: Values for the periscope-agent chart (#42). Validates required fields at install time so operators get a clear error instead of a template-side fail.

serverURL.description: Central Periscope tunnel URL. wss:// in production; ws:// only for kind/dev. Both http(s):// also accepted (the agent translates to ws:// for the WebSocket upgrade).

clusterName.description: Cluster name as registered with the central server. Must match a clusters[].name entry of backend: agent. Validated against the same DNS-1123-ish rule the server enforces.

registrationToken.description: Bootstrap token from POST /api/agents/tokens. Required on first install only — leave empty on subsequent upgrades. Single-use, 15-min TTL.

stateSecretName.description: Name of the K8s Secret the agent persists its mTLS cert + key + server CA into.

healthAddr.description: Bind addr for the kubelet probe target. Format ':PORT'.

replicaCount.description: Tunnel sessions are 1:1 with agent pods; HA needs server-side peer routing (v1.5+). Single replica only for v1.x.

enabled.description: When true, the chart binds a ClusterRole granting the agent SA cluster-wide read + impersonate. Set false to ship a tighter custom ClusterRole and bind it yourself.

env.description: Extra env vars appended to the container's env list. Use for future PERISCOPE_* knobs that don't yet have a dedicated values field.
